title: Currency & Recency
subtitle: Track your flight currency and credential validity.
passengerCurrencyDesc: Recent landings required to carry passengers. You can still fly solo without passenger currency.
noRatings: No class ratings found. Add a license with class ratings to see currency status.
noCredentials: No credentials found. Add medicals and certificates to track validity.
noNightPrivilege: No night flying privilege for this license type
tier1Description: Determines whether you can fly at all in this class.
tier2Description: Determines whether you can carry passengers. You can still fly solo without passenger currency.
windowClosedHint: Recently revalidated — flights logged before this date don't count toward the next revalidation.

expiryBanner.subtitle_one: {{count}} item needs action to stay current.
expiryBanner.subtitle_other: {{count}} items need action to stay current.

training_flight.expiring: Fly the required hours, landings and refresher training with an instructor before the expiry date to revalidate without a check.
training_flight.expired: Contact an instructor or training organisation — renewal now requires refresher training and a proficiency check with an examiner.

proficiency_check.expiring: Book a proficiency check with an examiner before the expiry date.
proficiency_check.expired: Book a proficiency check (or IPC) with an examiner or instructor to reactivate it. Refresher training may also be required.

flight_review.expiring: Schedule a flight review (1h ground + 1h flight) with a CFI before it's due.
flight_review.expired: You're overdue for a flight review — schedule one with a CFI before acting as PIC.

generic.expiring: Complete the requirements shown below before the expiry date.
generic.expired: This has expired — check the requirements below or contact your instructor/examiner to renew it.

ruleDescriptions.easa_sep_tmg: Requires 12h total flight time + 6h as PIC + 12 takeoffs & landings + 1h refresher training with instructor within the 12 months preceding the expiry date of the rating (EASA FCL.740.A(b)(1))
ruleDescriptions.easa_mep_set: Requires proficiency check, or 10 route sectors + 1h refresher training with instructor within the 12 months preceding the expiry date (EASA FCL.740.A(b)(2))
ruleDescriptions.easa_ir: Requires 10h IFR flight time + annual proficiency check within the 12 months preceding the expiry date (EASA FCL.625.A)
ruleDescriptions.easa_lapl: Requires 12h flight time + 12 takeoffs & landings + 1h training flight with instructor within the last 24 months (EASA FCL.140.A)
ruleDescriptions.easa_spl: Requires 5h PIC flight time + 15 launches + 2 training flights with instructor within the last 24 months (EASA FCL.140.S)
ruleDescriptions.easa_spl_tmg: Requires 12h flight time + 12 takeoffs & landings on TMG within the last 24 months (EASA FCL.140.S(b)(2))
ruleDescriptions.easa_pax: 3 takeoffs & landings (day) and 1 takeoff & landing at night in same type/class within preceding 90 days to carry passengers; the night requirement is waived for pilots holding a valid IR (EASA FCL.060(b))
ruleDescriptions.faa_pax_day_night: 3 takeoffs & landings in preceding 90 days for day passenger currency; 3 full-stop night takeoffs & landings in preceding 90 days for night passenger currency (14 CFR 61.57(a)/(b))
ruleDescriptions.faa_ir: Requires 6 instrument approaches + holding procedures within the preceding 6 calendar months (14 CFR 61.57(c))
ruleDescriptions.faa_glider: Requires 3 launches & landings in preceding 90 days (14 CFR 61.57(a))
ruleDescriptions.faa_flight_review: Flight review required every 24 calendar months (14 CFR 61.56)
ruleDescriptions.ul_luftpersv: Requires 12h flight time + 12 takeoffs & landings + 1h training flight with instructor in 24 months (LuftPersV §45)
ruleDescriptions.ul_pax: Passenger authorization required — 3 takeoffs & landings in 90 days (Passagierberechtigung)
